Getting Started

Installation

Platform requirements, NuGet packages, and building from source

#Installation

PhoenixmlDb is distributed as NuGet packages. Choose the packages that match your deployment scenario.

#Package Options

Package

Description

Use Case

PhoenixmlDb

Core embedded database

Single-application embedded use

PhoenixmlDb.Server

gRPC server

Multi-client server deployment

PhoenixmlDb.Client

Client SDK

Connect to PhoenixmlDb server

PhoenixmlDb.Cluster

Clustering support

Distributed high-availability

#Embedded Installation

For embedded use in a single application:

.NET CLI

Package Manager

PackageReference

#Server Installation

For multi-client server deployment:

#Cluster Installation

For distributed deployment with high availability:

#Platform Requirements

#Windows

  • Windows 10 version 1607 or later

  • Windows Server 2016 or later

  • .NET 10.0 runtime

#Linux

  • Ubuntu 20.04, 22.04, or 24.04

  • Debian 11 or 12

  • RHEL 8 or 9

  • .NET 10.0 runtime

  • liblmdb (usually included, or install via package manager)

#macOS

  • macOS 12 (Monterey) or later

  • .NET 10.0 runtime

  • lmdb via Homebrew (optional, native library included)

#Verifying Installation

Create a simple test to verify the installation:

#Build from Source

To build PhoenixmlDb from source:
